name: dingo-data-quality
description: Dingo: A Comprehensive AI Data, Model and Application Quality Evaluation Tool.
author: MigoXLab

optional.OPENAI_API_KEY: API key for LLM-based evaluation and ArticleFactChecker fact-checking
optional.OPENAI_MODEL: Model name for LLM evaluation (default: gpt-5.4-mini)
optional.TAVILY_API_KEY: Tavily API key for web search verification in ArticleFactChecker (optional but recommended)
